title: Core types, CLI skeleton, and TOON output
summary: Cargo.toml with all deps, core types in index.rs, clap CLI with 5 subcommands, TOON output with 8 tests, glob matching with 11 tests, git root detection with 2 tests, grep passthrough stub.
learnings: tree-sitter grammar crates compile fine with edition 2024
SystemTime needs custom serde — used (secs, nanos) tuple
clap trailing_var_arg + allow_hyphen_values needed for grep passthrough

title: Index lifecycle: crawl, persist, incremental update
summary: Index load_or_build with full crawl and incremental update. Walks project tree skipping SKIP_DIRS and .cx-ignore. Atomic save via tmp+rename. Preserves read_cache across updates. 5 new tests.
learnings: walkdir filter_entry skips entire subtrees — use for SKIP_DIRS
incremental update must preserve read_cache when updating changed FileEntry mtime
exports start empty — language modules populate in unit 3

title: Rust language module with tree-sitter symbol extraction
summary: RustModule extracts symbols via TAGS_QUERY, deduplicates method/fn overlaps, detects pub visibility, builds signatures. Wired into index crawl and incremental update. 7 new tests.
learnings: tree-sitter-rust exposes TAGS_QUERY constant not TAGGING_QUERY
tags.scm matches both definition.method (in declaration_list) and definition.function for impl methods — must deduplicate by byte_range keeping method kind
String::as_str() is unstable in edition 2024 — use &** instead
capture_names() returns &[String], index with capture.index not pattern_index

title: symbols and overview queries
summary: Implemented symbols query with file/name/kind filtering and TOON+JSON output. Overview dispatches to symbols with single_file mode. Exit code 2 on empty results.
learnings: make_relative must resolve cwd-relative paths against project root for index lookups
multiline function signatures are correctly quoted by toon_escape — working as designed
single_file flag controls whether file column appears in output

title: definition query with truncation
summary: cx definition looks up symbols by exact name, reads source bytes at byte_range, outputs TOON scalar. --from disambiguates, --max-lines truncates with metadata. JSON mode works.
learnings: read_body slices source bytes directly — no re-parsing needed
toon_scalar handles multiline body via | block syntax automatically
separator --- between multiple definition results for readability

title: read command with session cache
summary: cx read with PPID-based session scoping. First read returns full content, re-reads return unchanged/changed status with hash. --fresh bypasses cache. DefaultHasher for content hashing.
learnings: PPID works correctly for session scoping — each shell invocation from same parent shares session
DefaultHasher is deterministic within a process but may vary across Rust versions — fine for cache invalidation
touch only changes mtime not content, so hash stays same — correct behavior for content-based cache

title: grep passthrough
summary: Already implemented in unit 1. Verified rg passthrough with -rn, -i, -l, --count flags. Exit codes match rg. Falls back to grep if rg unavailable.
learnings: Command::status() inherits stdout/stderr by default — no explicit piping needed for passthrough

title: TypeScript language module
summary: TypeScriptModule with custom query for functions, classes, methods, interfaces, types, enums, modules, and arrow functions. Uses LANGUAGE_TSX for .tsx/.jsx files. Export detection via parent node check.
learnings: tree-sitter-typescript bundled tags.scm is too minimal — needed custom query for function/class declarations
LANGUAGE_TYPESCRIPT vs LANGUAGE_TSX are separate grammars — must select based on file extension
parse_and_extract now takes path parameter for grammar selection
arrow functions captured via lexical_declaration/variable_declaration with arrow_function value

title: Python language module
summary: PythonModule uses TAGS_QUERY for functions, classes, and module-level assignments. Top-level + non-underscore = exported. 7 new tests.
learnings: Python assignment captures: assignment node's parent is expression_statement, not module directly — must walk up ancestors
is_top_level walks ancestor chain looking for module, stops at function_definition/class_definition boundaries

title: End-to-end integration test on real codebase
summary: 8 integration tests exercising all commands against cx own source: overview, symbols, definition, read, grep, JSON mode, error exits (1 for missing file, 2 for no match).
learnings: env\!("CARGO_BIN_EXE_cx") gives correct binary path in integration tests
CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR sets cwd to project root for reproducible tests
